data.name: 结构强度仿真与迭代（Structural FEA）
효율적인 다목적 로봇 설계를 위한 단조 부시스템 분해
本体结构工程与原型（Mechanical Structure）

data.description: Monotone Subsystem Decomposition for Efficient Multi-Objective Robot Design discusses Ontological Structure Engineering and Prototyping (Mechanical Structure).
Monotone Subsystem Decomposition for Efficient Multi-Objective Robot Design discusses Requirements Definition and System Design (Concept / Pre-A).
Monotone Subsystem Decomposition for Efficient Multi-Objective Robot Design discusses Structural FEA and iteration.
